tEn: GLM: General Language Model Pretraining with Autoregressive Blank Infilling
tZh: GLM：基于自回归空白填充的通用语言模型预训练
sEn: GLM outperforms BERT, T5, and GPT across NLU, conditional and unconditional generation tasks with a single pretrained model.
sZh: GLM 在自然语言理解、条件生成和无条件生成任务上，使用单一预训练模型超越了 BERT、T5 和 GPT。
absEn: There have been various types of pretraining architectures including autoencoding models (e.g., BERT), autoregressive models (e.g., GPT), and encoder-decoder models (e.g., T5). However, none of the pretraining frameworks performs the best for all tasks of three main categories including natural language understanding (NLU), unconditional generation, and conditional generation. We propose a General Language Model (GLM) based on autoregressive blank infilling to address this challenge. GLM improves blank filling pretraining by adding 2D positional encodings and allowing an arbitrary order to predict spans, which results in performance gains over BERT and T5 on NLU tasks. Meanwhile, GLM can be pretrained for different types of tasks by varying the number and lengths of blanks. On a wide range of tasks across NLU, conditional and unconditional generation, GLM outperforms BERT, T5, and GPT given the same model sizes and data, and achieves the best performance from a single pretrained model with 1.25x parameters of BERT Large , demonstrating its generalizability to different downstream tasks.
absZh: 现有的预训练架构包括自编码模型（如BERT）、自回归模型（如GPT）和编码器-解码器模型（如T5），但没有一种框架能在自然语言理解（NLU）、无条件生成和条件生成这三类主要任务中表现最佳。我们提出了一种基于自回归空白填充的通用语言模型（GLM）来解决这一挑战。GLM通过添加二维位置编码并允许以任意顺序预测片段，改进了空白填充预训练，从而在NLU任务上相比BERT和T5取得了性能提升。同时，通过改变空白的数量和长度，GLM可以针对不同类型的任务进行预训练。在NLU、条件生成和无条件生成的广泛任务中，在相同模型大小和数据条件下，GLM优于BERT、T5和GPT，并且仅使用参数为BERT Large 1.25倍的单一预训练模型就取得了最佳性能，展示了其对不同下游任务的泛化能力。

contrib.en: Proposes GLM, a general language model based on autoregressive blank infilling.
contrib.zh: 提出GLM，一种基于自回归空白填充的通用语言模型。

contrib.en: Introduces 2D positional encodings and span shuffling to improve blank filling pretraining.
contrib.zh: 引入2D位置编码和跨度打乱以改进空白填充预训练。

contrib.en: Unifies NLU, conditional, and unconditional generation tasks under a single pretraining framework.
contrib.zh: 在单一预训练框架下统一NLU、条件生成和无条件生成任务。

contrib.en: Outperforms BERT, T5, and GPT on NLU and generation tasks with similar model sizes.
contrib.zh: 在相似模型规模下，在NLU和生成任务上优于BERT、T5和GPT。

contrib.en: Achieves state-of-the-art results on text infilling tasks like Yahoo Answers.
contrib.zh: 在Yahoo Answers等文本填充任务上取得最先进结果。

contrib.en: Demonstrates effective parameter sharing across diverse downstream tasks.
contrib.zh: 展示了跨不同下游任务的有效参数共享。

limits.en: Requires manual crafting of cloze patterns for NLU tasks.
limits.zh: 需要为NLU任务手动设计完形填空模式。

limits.en: Multi-task pretraining may slightly degrade NLU performance compared to single-task.
limits.zh: 多任务预训练可能比单任务略微降低NLU性能。

limits.en: Language modeling perplexity lags behind GPT without bidirectional context.
limits.zh: 无双向上下文时，语言建模困惑度落后于GPT。

limits.en: Evaluation limited to English and specific datasets like SuperGLUE.
limits.zh: 评估限于英语和SuperGLUE等特定数据集。

limits.en: Scaling to larger models requires more computational resources.
limits.zh: 扩展到更大模型需要更多计算资源。

items.en: There have been various types of pretraining architectures including autoencoding models (e.g., BERT), autoregressive models (e.g., GPT), and encoder-decoder models (e.g., T5). However, none of the pretraining frameworks performs the best for all tasks of three main categories including natural language understanding (NLU), unconditional generation, and conditional generation. We propose a General Language Model (GLM) based on autoregressive blank infilling to address this challenge. GLM improves blank filling pretraining by adding 2D positional encodings and allowing an arbitrary order to predict spans, which results in performance gains over BERT and T5 on NLU tasks. Meanwhile, GLM can be pretrained for different types of tasks by varying the number and lengths of blanks. On a wide range of tasks across NLU, conditional and unconditional generation, GLM outperforms BERT, T5, and GPT given the same model sizes and data, and achieves the best performance from a single pretrained model with 1.25×\times parameters of BERTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}, demonstrating its generalizability to different downstream tasks.111The code and pre-trained models are available at https://github.com/THUDM/GLM
items.zh: 已有多种预训练架构，包括自编码模型（如BERT）、自回归模型（如GPT）和编码器-解码器模型（如T5）。然而，没有任何一种预训练框架能在自然语言理解（NLU）、无条件生成和条件生成这三类主要任务中表现最佳。我们提出了一种基于自回归空白填充的通用语言模型（GLM）来解决这一挑战。GLM通过添加二维位置编码并允许任意顺序预测片段来改进空白填充预训练，从而在NLU任务上优于BERT和T5。同时，通过改变空白的数量和长度，GLM可以为不同类型的任务进行预训练。在NLU、条件生成和无条件生成的广泛任务中，在相同模型大小和数据条件下，GLM优于BERT、T5和GPT，并以1.25×BERTLarge的参数规模从单个预训练模型取得了最佳性能，展示了其对不同下游任务的泛化能力。代码和预训练模型可在https://github.com/THUDM/GLM获取。

items.en: Language models pretrained on unlabeled texts have substantially advanced the state of the art in various NLP tasks, ranging from natural language understanding (NLU) to text generation Radford et al. (2018a); Devlin et al. (2019); Yang et al. (2019); Radford et al. (2018b); Raffel et al. (2020); Lewis et al. (2019); Brown et al. (2020). Downstream task performance as well as the scale of the parameters have also constantly increased in the past few years.
items.zh: 在未标注文本上预训练的语言模型已显著推进了各种NLP任务的最新技术，从自然语言理解（NLU）到文本生成（Radford et al., 2018a; Devlin et al., 2019; Yang et al., 2019; Radford et al., 2018b; Raffel et al., 2020; Lewis et al., 2019; Brown et al., 2020）。过去几年中，下游任务性能以及参数规模也在持续增长。

items.capEn: Figure 1: Illustration of GLM. We blank out text spans (green part) and generate them autoregressively. (Some attention edges are omitted; cf. Figure 2.)
items.capZh: 图1：GLM示意图。我们空白出文本片段（绿色部分）并自回归地生成它们。（部分注意力边被省略；参见图2。）

items.en: In general, existing pretraining frameworks can be categorized into three families: autoregressive, autoencoding, and encoder-decoder models. Autoregressive models, such as GPT Radford et al. (2018a), learn left-to-right language models. While they succeed in long-text generation and show few-shot learning ability when scaled to billions of parameters Radford et al. (2018b); Brown et al. (2020), the inherent disadvantage is the unidirectional attention mechanism, which cannot fully capture the dependencies between the context words in NLU tasks. Autoencoding models, such as BERT Devlin et al. (2019), learn bidirectional context encoders via denoising objectives, e.g. Masked Language Model (MLM). The encoders produce contextualized representations that suit natural language understanding tasks, but could not be directly applied for text generation. Encoder-decoder models adopt bidirectional attention for the encoder, unidirectional attention for the decoder, and cross attention between them Song et al. (2019); Bi et al. (2020); Lewis et al. (2019). They are typically deployed in conditional generation tasks, such as text summarization and response generation. 222Unconditional generation refers to generating text as a language model without finetuning, while conditional generation refers to sequence-to-sequence tasks.. T5 Raffel et al. (2020) unifies NLU and conditional generation via encoder-decoder models but requires more parameters to match the performance of BRET-based models such as RoBERTa Liu et al. (2019) and DeBERTa He et al. (2021).
items.zh: 总体而言，现有预训练框架可分为三类：自回归模型、自编码模型和编码器-解码器模型。自回归模型（如GPT（Radford et al., 2018a））学习从左到右的语言模型。虽然它们在长文本生成方面表现出色，并在扩展到数十亿参数时展现出少样本学习能力（Radford et al., 2018b; Brown et al., 2020），但其固有缺点是单向注意力机制，无法完全捕捉NLU任务中上下文词之间的依赖关系。自编码模型（如BERT（Devlin et al., 2019））通过去噪目标（如掩码语言模型（MLM））学习双向上下文编码器。编码器产生适合自然语言理解任务的上下文表示，但不能直接用于文本生成。编码器-解码器模型对编码器采用双向注意力，对解码器采用单向注意力，并在它们之间采用交叉注意力（Song et al., 2019; Bi et al., 2020; Lewis et al., 2019）。它们通常用于条件生成任务，如文本摘要和回复生成。无条件生成指作为语言模型生成文本而无需微调，而条件生成指序列到序列任务。T5（Raffel et al., 2020）通过编码器-解码器模型统一了NLU和条件生成，但需要更多参数才能匹配基于BERT的模型（如RoBERTa（Liu et al., 2019）和DeBERTa（He et al., 2021））的性能。

items.en: None of these pretraining frameworks is flexible enough to perform competitively across all NLP tasks. Previous works have tried to unify different frameworks by combining their objectives via multi-task learning Dong et al. (2019); Bao et al. (2020). However, since the autoencoding and autoregressive objectives differ by nature, a simple unification cannot fully inherit the advantages of both frameworks.
items.zh: 这些预训练框架中没有一个足够灵活，能在所有NLP任务中具有竞争力。先前的工作尝试通过多任务学习结合不同框架的目标来统一它们（Dong et al., 2019; Bao et al., 2020）。然而，由于自编码和自回归目标本质不同，简单的统一无法完全继承两个框架的优势。

items.en: In this paper, we propose a pretraining framework named GLM (General Language Model), based on autoregressive blank infilling. We randomly blank out continuous spans of tokens from the input text, following the idea of autoencoding, and train the model to sequentially reconstruct the spans, following the idea of autoregressive pretraining (see Figure 1). While blanking filling has been used in T5 Raffel et al. (2020) for text-to-text pretraining, we propose two improvements, namely span shuffling and 2D positional encoding. Empirically, we show that with the same amount of parameters and computational cost, GLM significantly outperforms BERT on the SuperGLUE benchmark by a large margin of 4.6% – 5.0% and outperforms RoBERTa and BART when pretrained on a corpus of similar size (158GB). GLM also significantly outperforms T5 on NLU and generation tasks with fewer parameters and data.
items.zh: 在本文中，我们提出了一种名为GLM（通用语言模型）的预训练框架，基于自回归空白填充。我们随机从输入文本中空白出连续的词元片段，遵循自编码的思想，并训练模型顺序重建这些片段，遵循自回归预训练的思想（见图1）。虽然空白填充已在T5（Raffel et al., 2020）中用于文本到文本的预训练，但我们提出了两项改进，即片段打乱和二维位置编码。实验表明，在相同参数和计算成本下，GLM在SuperGLUE基准上以4.6%–5.0%的显著优势大幅优于BERT，并在相似规模（158GB）的语料上预训练时优于RoBERTa和BART。GLM还在更少的参数和数据下显著优于T5在NLU和生成任务上的表现。

items.en: Inspired by Pattern-Exploiting Training (PET) Schick and Schütze (2020a), we reformulate NLU tasks as manually-crafted cloze questions that mimic human language. Different from the BERT-based models used by PET, GLM can naturally handle multi-token answers to the cloze question via autoregressive blank filling.
items.zh: 受模式利用训练（PET）（Schick and Schütze, 2020a）启发，我们将NLU任务重新表述为模仿人类语言的手工完形填空问题。与PET使用的基于BERT的模型不同，GLM可以通过自回归空白填充自然地处理完形填空问题的多词元答案。

items.en: Furthermore, we show that by varying the number and lengths of missing spans, the autoregressive blank filling objective can pretrain language models for conditional and unconditional generation. Through multi-task learning of different pretraining objectives, a single GLM can excel in both NLU and (conditional and unconditional) text generation. Empirically, compared with standalone baselines, GLM with multi-task pretraining achieves improvements in NLU, conditional text generation, and language modeling tasks altogether by sharing the parameters.
items.zh: 此外，我们表明，通过改变缺失片段的数量和长度，自回归空白填充目标可以为条件生成和无条件生成预训练语言模型。通过不同预训练目标的多任务学习，单个GLM可以在NLU和（条件及无条件）文本生成方面都表现出色。实验表明，与独立基线相比，具有多任务预训练的GLM通过共享参数在NLU、条件文本生成和语言建模任务上均取得了改进。

items.capEn: Figure 2: GLM pretraining. (a) The original text is [x1,x2,x3,x4,x5,x6]subscript𝑥1subscript𝑥2subscript𝑥3subscript𝑥4subscript𝑥5subscript𝑥6[x_{1},x_{2},x_{3},x_{4},x_{5},x_{6}]. Two spans [x3]delimited-[]subscript𝑥3[x_{3}] and [x5,x6]subscript𝑥5subscript𝑥6[x_{5},x_{6}] are sampled. (b) Replace the sampled spans with [M] in Part A, and shuffle the spans in Part B. (c) GLM autoregressively generates Part B. Each span is prepended with [S] as input and appended with [E] as output. 2D positional encoding represents inter- and intra-span positions. (d) Self-attention mask. Grey areas are masked out. Part A tokens can attend to themselves (blue frame) but not B. Part B tokens can attend to A and their antecedents in B (yellow and green frames correspond to the two spans). [M]:=[MASK]assigndelimited-[]Mdelimited-[]MASK[\text{M}]:=[\text{MASK}], [S]:=[START]assigndelimited-[]Sdelimited-[]START[\text{S}]:=[\text{START}], and [E]:=[END]assigndelimited-[]Edelimited-[]END[\text{E}]:=[\text{END}].
items.capZh: 图2：GLM预训练。(a) 原始文本为[x1,x2,x3,x4,x5,x6]。采样两个片段[x3]和[x5,x6]。(b) 在部分A中将采样片段替换为[M]，并在部分B中打乱片段顺序。(c) GLM自回归地生成部分B。每个片段前添加[S]作为输入，后添加[E]作为输出。二维位置编码表示片段间和片段内的位置。(d) 自注意力掩码。灰色区域被掩码。部分A的词元可以相互关注（蓝色框）但不能关注B。部分B的词元可以关注A以及B中它们的前驱（黄色和绿色框对应两个片段）。[M]:=[MASK]，[S]:=[START]，[E]:=[END]。

items.en: We propose a general pretraining framework GLM based on a novel autoregressive blank infilling objective. GLM formulates NLU tasks as cloze questions that contain task descriptions, which can be answered by autoregressive generation.
items.zh: 我们提出了一种基于新颖的自回归空白填充目标的通用预训练框架GLM。GLM将NLU任务表述为包含任务描述的完形填空问题，这些问题可以通过自回归生成来回答。

items.en: GLM is trained by optimizing an autoregressive blank infilling objective. Given an input text 𝒙=[x1,⋯,xn]𝒙subscript𝑥1⋯subscript𝑥𝑛\boldsymbol{x}=[x_{1},\cdots,x_{n}], multiple text spans {𝒔1,⋯,𝒔m}subscript𝒔1⋯subscript𝒔𝑚\{\boldsymbol{s}_{1},\cdots,\boldsymbol{s}_{m}\} are sampled, where each span 𝒔isubscript𝒔𝑖\boldsymbol{s}_{i} corresponds to a series of consecutive tokens [si,1,⋯,si,li]subscript𝑠𝑖1⋯subscript𝑠𝑖subscript𝑙𝑖[s_{i,1},\cdots,s_{i,l_{i}}] in 𝒙𝒙\boldsymbol{x}. Each span is replaced with a single [MASK]delimited-[]MASK[\text{MASK}] token, forming a corrupted text 𝒙corruptsubscript𝒙corrupt\boldsymbol{x}_{\text{corrupt}}. The model predicts the missing tokens in the spans from the corrupted text in an autoregressive manner, which means when predicting the missing tokens in a span, the model has access to the corrupted text and the previously predicted spans. To fully capture the interdependencies between different spans, we randomly permute the order of the spans, similar to the permutation language model Yang et al. (2019). Formally, let Zmsubscript𝑍𝑚Z_{m} be the set of all possible permutations of the length-m𝑚m index sequence [1,2,⋯,m]12⋯𝑚[1,2,\cdots,m], and 𝒔𝒛<isubscript𝒔subscript𝒛absent𝑖\boldsymbol{s}_{\boldsymbol{z}_{<i}} be [𝒔z1,⋯,𝒔zi−1]subscript𝒔subscript𝑧1⋯subscript𝒔subscript𝑧𝑖1[\boldsymbol{s}_{z_{1}},\cdots,\boldsymbol{s}_{z_{i-1}}], we define the pretraining objective as
items.zh: GLM通过优化自回归空白填充目标进行训练。给定输入文本𝒙=[x1,⋯,xn]，采样多个文本片段{𝒔1,⋯,𝒔m}，其中每个片段𝒔i对应𝒙中一系列连续词元[si,1,⋯,si,li]。每个片段被替换为一个[MASK]词元，形成损坏文本𝒙corrupt。模型以自回归方式从损坏文本中预测片段中的缺失词元，这意味着在预测一个片段中的缺失词元时，模型可以访问损坏文本和先前预测的片段。为了充分捕捉不同片段之间的相互依赖关系，我们随机排列片段的顺序，类似于排列语言模型（Yang et al., 2019）。形式上，令Zm为长度m的索引序列[1,2,⋯,m]的所有可能排列的集合，𝒔𝒛<i为[𝒔z1,⋯,𝒔zi−1]，我们定义预训练目标为

items.en: We always generate the tokens in each blank following a left-to-right order, i.e. the probability of generating the span 𝒔isubscript𝒔𝑖\boldsymbol{s}_{i} is factorized as:
items.zh: 我们始终按照从左到右的顺序生成每个空白中的词元，即生成片段𝒔i的概率分解为：

items.en: We implement the autoregressive blank infilling objective with the following techniques. The input 𝒙𝒙\boldsymbol{x} is divided into two parts: Part A is the corrupted text 𝒙corruptsubscript𝒙corrupt\boldsymbol{x}_{\text{corrupt}}, and Part B consists of the masked spans. Part A tokens can attend to each other, but cannot attend to any tokens in B. Part B tokens can attend to Part A and antecedents in B, but cannot attend to any subsequent tokens in B. To enable autoregressive generation, each span is padded with special tokens [START]delimited-[]START[\text{START}] and [END]delimited-[]END[\text{END}], for input and output respectively. In this way, our model automatically learns a bidirectional encoder (for Part A) and a unidirectional decoder (for Part B) in a unified model. The implementation of GLM is illustrated in Figure 2.
items.zh: 我们通过以下技术实现自回归空白填充目标。输入𝒙分为两部分：部分A是损坏文本𝒙corrupt，部分B由掩码片段组成。部分A的词元可以相互关注，但不能关注B中的任何词元。部分B的词元可以关注部分A和B中的前驱，但不能关注B中的后续词元。为了实现自回归生成，每个片段分别用特殊词元[START]和[END]作为输入和输出进行填充。这样，我们的模型在统一模型中自动学习双向编码器（用于部分A）和单向解码器（用于部分B）。GLM的实现如图2所示。

items.en: We randomly sample spans of length drawn from a Poisson distribution with λ=3𝜆3\lambda=3. We repeatedly sample new spans until at least 15% of the original tokens are masked. Empirically, we have found that the 15% ratio is critical for good performance on downstream NLU tasks.
items.zh: 我们随机采样长度服从λ=3的泊松分布的片段。重复采样新片段，直到至少15%的原始词元被掩码。实验发现，15%的比例对于下游NLU任务的良好性能至关重要。

items.en: In the previous section, GLM masks short spans and is suited for NLU tasks. However, we are interested in pretraining a single model that can handle both NLU and text generation. We then study a multi-task pretraining setup, in which a second objective of generating longer text is jointly optimized with the blank infilling objective. We consider the following two objectives:
items.zh: 在前一节中，GLM掩码短片段，适用于NLU任务。然而，我们有兴趣预训练一个能够同时处理NLU和文本生成的单一模型。因此，我们研究了一种多任务预训练设置，其中生成较长文本的第二个目标与空白填充目标联合优化。我们考虑以下两个目标：

items.en: Document-level. We sample a single span whose length is sampled from a uniform distribution over 50%–100% of the original length. The objective aims for long text generation.
items.zh: 文档级。采样一个片段，其长度从原始长度的50%–100%的均匀分布中采样。该目标旨在长文本生成。

items.en: Sentence-level. We restrict that the masked spans must be full sentences. Multiple spans (sentences) are sampled to cover 15% of the original tokens. This objective aims for seq2seq tasks whose predictions are often complete sentences or paragraphs.
items.zh: 句子级。我们限制掩码片段必须是完整句子。采样多个片段（句子）以覆盖原始词元的15%。该目标旨在预测结果通常是完整句子或段落的序列到序列任务。

items.en: Both new objectives are defined in the same way as the original objective, i.e. Eq. 1. The only difference is the number of spans and the span lengths.
items.zh: 这两个新目标与原始目标的定义方式相同，即公式1。唯一的区别是片段的数量和片段长度。

items.en: GLM uses a single Transformer with several modifications to the architecture: (1) we rearrange the order of layer normalization and the residual connection, which has been shown critical for large-scale language models to avoid numerical errors Shoeybi et al. (2019); (2) we use a single linear layer for the output token prediction; (3) we replace ReLU activation functions with GeLUs Hendrycks and Gimpel (2016).
items.zh: GLM使用单个Transformer，并对架构进行了若干修改：(1) 我们重新排列了层归一化和残差连接的顺序，这已被证明对于大规模语言模型避免数值错误至关重要（Shoeybi et al., 2019）；(2) 我们使用单个线性层进行输出词元预测；(3) 我们将ReLU激活函数替换为GeLU（Hendrycks and Gimpel, 2016）。

items.en: One of the challenges of the autoregressive blank infilling task is how to encode the positional information. Transformers rely on positional encodings to inject the absolute and relative positions of the tokens. We propose 2D positional encodings to address the challenge. Specifically, each token is encoded with two positional ids. The first positional id represents the position in the corrupted text 𝒙corruptsubscript𝒙corrupt\boldsymbol{x}_{\text{corrupt}}. For the masked spans, it is the position of the corresponding [MASK]delimited-[]MASK[\text{MASK}] token. The second positional id represents the intra-span position. For tokens in Part A, their second positional ids are 00. For tokens in Part B, they range from 1 to the length of the span. The two positional ids are projected into two vectors via learnable embedding tables, which are both added to the input token embeddings.
items.zh: 自回归空白填充任务的挑战之一是如何编码位置信息。Transformer依赖位置编码来注入词元的绝对和相对位置。我们提出二维位置编码来解决这一挑战。具体来说，每个词元用两个位置ID编码。第一个位置ID表示在损坏文本𝒙corrupt中的位置。对于掩码片段，它是相应[MASK]词元的位置。第二个位置ID表示片段内的位置。对于部分A中的词元，其第二个位置ID为0。对于部分B中的词元，它们从1到片段长度。这两个位置ID通过可学习的嵌入表投影为两个向量，并都加到输入词元嵌入上。

items.en: Our encoding method ensures that the model is not aware of the length of the masked span when reconstructing them. It is an important difference as compared to other models. For example, XLNet Yang et al. (2019) encodes the original position so that it can perceive the number of missing tokens, and SpanBERT Joshi et al. (2020) replaces the span with multiple [MASK] tokens and keeps the length unchanged. Our design fits downstream tasks as usually the length of the generated text is unknown beforehand.
items.zh: 我们的编码方法确保模型在重建掩码跨度时不知道其长度。这是与其他模型相比的一个重要区别。例如，XLNet (Yang et al., 2019) 编码原始位置，因此可以感知缺失标记的数量，而 SpanBERT (Joshi et al., 2020) 用多个 [MASK] 标记替换跨度并保持长度不变。我们的设计适合下游任务，因为通常生成文本的长度事先未知。

items.capEn: Figure 3: Formulation of the sentiment classification task as blank infilling with GLM.
items.capZh: 图 3：将情感分类任务表述为使用 GLM 的空白填充。

items.en: Typically, for downstream NLU tasks, a linear classifier takes the representations of sequences or tokens produced by pretrained models as input and predicts the correct labels. The practices are different from the generative pretraining task, leading to inconsistency between pretraining and finetuning.
items.zh: 通常，对于下游 NLU 任务，线性分类器将预训练模型产生的序列或标记表示作为输入，并预测正确的标签。这些做法与生成式预训练任务不同，导致预训练和微调之间存在不一致。

items.en: Instead, we reformulate NLU classification tasks as generation tasks of blank infilling, following PET Schick and Schütze (2020a). Specifically, given a labeled example (𝒙,y)𝒙𝑦(\boldsymbol{x},y), we convert the input text 𝒙𝒙\boldsymbol{x} to a cloze question c​(𝒙)𝑐𝒙c(\boldsymbol{x}) via a pattern containing a single mask token. The pattern is written in natural language to represent the semantics of the task. For example, a sentiment classification task can be formulated as “{SENTENCE}. It’s really [MASK]delimited-[]MASK[\text{MASK}]”. The candidate labels y∈𝒴𝑦𝒴y\in\mathcal{Y} are also mapped to answers to the cloze, called verbalizer v​(y)𝑣𝑦v(y). In sentiment classification, the labels “positive” and “negative” are mapped to the words “good” and “bad”. The conditional probability of predicting y𝑦y given 𝒙𝒙\boldsymbol{x} is
items.zh: 相反，我们遵循 PET (Schick and Schütze, 2020a)，将 NLU 分类任务重新表述为空白填充的生成任务。具体来说，给定一个带标签的样本 (𝒙, y)，我们通过包含单个掩码标记的模式将输入文本 𝒙 转换为完形填空问题 c(𝒙)。该模式用自然语言编写，以表示任务的语义。例如，情感分类任务可以表述为“{SENTENCE}. It's really [MASK]”。候选标签 y ∈ 𝒴 也映射到完形填空的答案，称为动词化器 v(y)。在情感分类中，标签“positive”和“negative”映射到单词“good”和“bad”。给定 𝒙 预测 y 的条件概率为

items.en: where 𝒴𝒴\mathcal{Y} is the label set. Therefore the probability of the sentence being positive or negative is proportional to predicting “good” or “bad” in the blank. Then we finetune GLM with a cross-entropy loss (see Figure 3).
items.zh: 其中 𝒴 是标签集。因此，句子是正面或负面的概率与在空白中预测“good”或“bad”成正比。然后我们使用交叉熵损失微调 GLM（见图 3）。

items.en: For text generation tasks, the given context constitutes the Part A of the input, with a mask token appended at the end. The model generates the text of Part B autoregressively. We can directly apply the pretrained GLM for unconditional generation, or finetune it on downstream conditional generation tasks.
items.zh: 对于文本生成任务，给定的上下文构成输入的第 A 部分，末尾附加一个掩码标记。模型自回归地生成第 B 部分的文本。我们可以直接应用预训练的 GLM 进行无条件生成，或在下游条件生成任务上对其进行微调。

items.en: In this section, we discuss the differences between GLM and other pretraining models. We are mainly concerned with how they can be adapted to downstream blank infilling tasks.
items.zh: 在本节中，我们讨论 GLM 与其他预训练模型之间的差异。我们主要关注它们如何适应下游的空白填充任务。

items.en: Comparison with BERT Devlin et al. (2019). As pointed out by Yang et al. (2019), BERT fails to capture the interdependencies of masked tokens due to the independence assumption of MLM. Another disadvantage of BERT is that it cannot fill in the blanks of multiple tokens properly. To infer the probability of an answer of length l𝑙l, BERT needs to perform l𝑙l consecutive predictions. If the length l𝑙l is unknown, we may need to enumerate all possible lengths, since BERT needs to change the number of [MASK]delimited-[]MASK[\text{MASK}] tokens according to the length.
items.zh: 与 BERT (Devlin et al., 2019) 的比较。正如 Yang et al. (2019) 指出的，由于 MLM 的独立性假设，BERT 无法捕捉掩码标记之间的相互依赖关系。BERT 的另一个缺点是它不能正确填充多个标记的空白。为了推断长度为 l 的答案的概率，BERT 需要执行 l 次连续预测。如果长度 l 未知，我们可能需要枚举所有可能的长度，因为 BERT 需要根据长度更改 [MASK] 标记的数量。

items.en: Comparison with XLNet Yang et al. (2019). Both GLM and XLNet are pretrained with autoregressive objectives, but there are two differences between them. First, XLNet uses the original position encodings before corruption. During inference, we need to either know or enumerate the length of the answer, the same problem as BERT. Second, XLNet uses a two-stream self-attention mechanism, instead of the right-shift, to avoid the information leak within Transformer. It doubles the time cost of pretraining.
items.zh: 与 XLNet (Yang et al., 2019) 的比较。GLM 和 XLNet 都使用自回归目标进行预训练，但两者之间存在两个差异。首先，XLNet 在损坏之前使用原始位置编码。在推理过程中，我们需要知道或枚举答案的长度，这与 BERT 的问题相同。其次，XLNet 使用双流自注意力机制，而不是右移，以避免 Transformer 内的信息泄漏。这使预训练的时间成本加倍。

items.en: Comparison with T5 Raffel et al. (2020). T5 proposes a similar blank infilling objective to pretrain an encoder-decoder Transformer. T5 uses independent positional encodings for the encoder and decoder, and relies on multiple sentinel tokens to differentiate the masked spans. In downstream tasks, only one of the sentinel tokens is used, leading to a waste of model capacity and inconsistency between pretraining and finetuning. Moreover, T5 always predicts spans in a fixed left-to-right order. As a result, GLM can significantly outperform T5 on NLU and seq2seq tasks with fewer parameters and data, as stated in Sections 3.2 and 3.3.
items.zh: 与 T5 (Raffel et al., 2020) 的比较。T5 提出了类似的空白填充目标来预训练编码器-解码器 Transformer。T5 对编码器和解码器使用独立的位置编码，并依赖多个哨兵标记来区分掩码跨度。在下游任务中，只使用其中一个哨兵标记，导致模型容量浪费以及预训练和微调之间的不一致。此外，T5 总是以固定的从左到右顺序预测跨度。因此，GLM 可以在参数和数据更少的情况下显著优于 T5 在 NLU 和 seq2seq 任务上的表现，如第 3.2 和 3.3 节所述。

items.en: Comparison with UniLM Dong et al. (2019). UniLM combines different pretraining objectives under the autoencoding framework by changing the attention mask among bidirectional, unidirectional, and cross attention. However, UniLM always replaces masked spans with [MASK] tokens, which limits its ability to model the dependencies between the masked spans and their context. GLM feeds in the previous token and autoregressively generates the next token. Finetuning UniLM on downstream generation tasks also relies on masked language modeling, which is less efficient. UniLMv2 Bao et al. (2020) adopts partially autoregressive modeling for generation tasks, along with the autoencoding objective for NLU tasks. Instead, GLM unifies NLU and generation tasks with autoregressive pretraining.
items.zh: 与 UniLM (Dong et al., 2019) 的比较。UniLM 通过改变双向、单向和交叉注意力之间的注意力掩码，在自编码框架下结合了不同的预训练目标。然而，UniLM 总是用 [MASK] 标记替换掩码跨度，这限制了它对掩码跨度与其上下文之间依赖关系建模的能力。GLM 输入前一个标记并自回归地生成下一个标记。在下游生成任务上微调 UniLM 也依赖于掩码语言建模，效率较低。UniLMv2 (Bao et al., 2020) 对生成任务采用部分自回归建模，同时对 NLU 任务采用自编码目标。相反，GLM 通过自回归预训练统一了 NLU 和生成任务。

items.en: We now describe our pretraining setup and the evaluation of downstream tasks.
items.zh: 我们现在描述我们的预训练设置和下游任务的评估。

items.en: For a fair comparison with BERT Devlin et al. (2019), we use BooksCorpus Zhu et al. (2015) and English Wikipedia as our pretraining data. We use the uncased wordpiece tokenizer of BERT with 30k vocabulary. We train GLMBaseBase{}_{\text{Base}} and GLMLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}} with the same architectures as BERTBaseBase{}_{\text{Base}} and BERTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}, containing 110M and 340M parameters respectively.
items.zh: 为了与 BERT (Devlin et al., 2019) 进行公平比较，我们使用 BooksCorpus (Zhu et al., 2015) 和英文维基百科作为预训练数据。我们使用 BERT 的 uncased wordpiece 分词器，词汇量为 30k。我们训练了与 BERTBase 和 BERTLarge 相同架构的 GLMBase 和 GLMLarge，分别包含 110M 和 340M 参数。

items.en: For multi-task pretraining, we train two Large-sized models with a mixture of the blank infilling objective and the document-level or sentence-level objective, denoted as GLMDocDoc{}_{\text{Doc}} and GLMSentSent{}_{\text{Sent}}. Additionally, we train two larger GLM models of 410M (30 layers, hidden size 1024, and 16 attention heads) and 515M (30 layers, hidden size 1152, and 18 attention heads) parameters with document-level multi-task pretraining, denoted as GLM410M410M{}_{\text{410M}} and GLM515M515M{}_{\text{515M}}.
items.zh: 对于多任务预训练，我们训练了两个 Large 大小的模型，混合了空白填充目标和文档级或句子级目标，分别记为 GLMDoc 和 GLMSent。此外，我们训练了两个更大的 GLM 模型，参数分别为 410M（30 层，隐藏大小 1024，16 个注意力头）和 515M（30 层，隐藏大小 1152，18 个注意力头），使用文档级多任务预训练，记为 GLM410M 和 GLM515M。

items.en: To compare with SOTA models, we also train a Large-sized model with the same data, tokenization, and hyperparameters as RoBERTa Liu et al. (2019), denoted as GLMRoBERTaRoBERTa{}_{\text{RoBERTa}}. Due to resource limitations, we only pretrain the model for 250,000 steps, which are half of RoBERTa and BART’s training steps and close to T5 in the number of trained tokens. More experiment details can be found in Appendix A.
items.zh: 为了与 SOTA 模型进行比较，我们还训练了一个 Large 大小的模型，使用与 RoBERTa (Liu et al., 2019) 相同的数据、分词和超参数，记为 GLMRoBERTa。由于资源限制，我们只预训练了 250,000 步，这是 RoBERTa 和 BART 训练步数的一半，并且接近 T5 的训练 token 数。更多实验细节见附录 A。

items.en: To evaluate our pretrained GLM models, we conduct experiments on the SuperGLUE benchmark Wang et al. (2019) and report the standard metrics. SuperGLUE consists of 8 challenging NLU tasks. We reformulate the classification tasks as blank infilling with human-crafted cloze questions, following PET Schick and Schütze (2020b). Then we finetune the pretrained GLM models on each task as described in Section 2.3. The cloze questions and other details can be found in Section B.1.
items.zh: 为了评估我们预训练的 GLM 模型，我们在 SuperGLUE 基准 (Wang et al., 2019) 上进行了实验，并报告了标准指标。SuperGLUE 包含 8 个具有挑战性的 NLU 任务。我们遵循 PET (Schick and Schütze, 2020b)，将分类任务重新表述为带有手工制作的完形填空问题的空白填充。然后我们在每个任务上微调预训练的 GLM 模型，如第 2.3 节所述。完形填空问题和其他细节见第 B.1 节。

items.en: For a fair comparison with GLMBaseBase{}_{\text{Base}} and GLMLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}, we choose BERTBaseBase{}_{\text{Base}} and BERTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}} as our baselines, which are pretrained on the same corpus and for a similar amount of time. We report the performance of standard finetuning (i.e. classification on the [CLS] token representation). The performance of BERT with cloze questions is reported in Section 3.4. To compare with GLMRoBERTaRoBERTa{}_{\text{RoBERTa}}, we choose T5, BARTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}, and RoBERTaLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}} as our baselines. T5 has no direct match in the number of parameters for BERTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}, so we present the results of both T5BaseBase{}_{\text{Base}} (220M parameters) and T5LargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}} (770M parameters). All the other baselines are of similar size to BERTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}.
items.zh: 为了与 GLMBase 和 GLMLarge 进行公平比较，我们选择 BERTBase 和 BERTLarge 作为基线，它们在相同的语料库上预训练了相似的时间。我们报告了标准微调（即对 [CLS] 标记表示进行分类）的性能。带有完形填空问题的 BERT 的性能在第 3.4 节中报告。为了与 GLMRoBERTa 进行比较，我们选择 T5、BARTLarge 和 RoBERTaLarge 作为基线。T5 没有与 BERTLarge 直接匹配的参数数量，因此我们展示了 T5Base（220M 参数）和 T5Large（770M 参数）的结果。所有其他基线的大小与 BERTLarge 相似。

items.en: Then we evaluate the GLM’s performance in a multi-task setting (Section 2.1). Within one training batch, we sample short spans and longer spans (document-level or sentence-level) with equal chances. We evaluate the multi-task model for NLU, seq2seq, blank infilling, and zero-shot language modeling.
items.zh: 然后我们在多任务设置中评估 GLM 的性能（第 2.1 节）。在一个训练批次中，我们以相等的概率采样短跨度和较长跨度（文档级或句子级）。我们评估多任务模型在 NLU、seq2seq、空白填充和零样本语言建模方面的表现。

items.en: SuperGLUE. For NLU tasks, we evaluate models on the SuperGLUE benchmark. The results are also shown in Table 1. We observe that with multi-task pretraining, GLMDocDoc{}_{\text{Doc}} and GLMSentSent{}_{\text{Sent}} perform slightly worse than GLMLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}, but still outperform BERTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}} and UniLMLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}. Among multi-task models, GLMSentSent{}_{\text{Sent}} outperforms GLMDocDoc{}_{\text{Doc}} by 1.1% on average. Increasing GLMDocDoc{}_{\text{Doc}}’s parameters to 410M (1.25×\timesBERTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}) leads to better performance than GLMLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}. GLM with 515M parameters (1.5×\timesBERTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}) can perform even better.
items.zh: SuperGLUE。对于 NLU 任务，我们在 SuperGLUE 基准上评估模型。结果也显示在表 1 中。我们观察到，通过多任务预训练，GLMDoc 和 GLMSent 的表现略差于 GLMLarge，但仍优于 BERTLarge 和 UniLMLarge。在多任务模型中，GLMSent 平均优于 GLMDoc 1.1%。将 GLMDoc 的参数增加到 410M（1.25×BERTLarge）可以获得比 GLMLarge 更好的性能。具有 515M 参数（1.5×BERTLarge）的 GLM 可以表现得更好。

items.en: Sequence-to-Sequence. Considering the available baseline results, we use the Gigaword dataset Rush et al. (2015) for abstractive summarization and the SQuAD 1.1 dataset Rajpurkar et al. (2016) for question generation Du et al. (2017) as the benchmarks for models pretrained on BookCorpus and Wikipedia. Additionally, we use the CNN/DailyMail See et al. (2017) and XSum Narayan et al. (2018) datasets for abstractive summarization as the benchmarks for models pretrained on larger corpora.
items.zh: 序列到序列。考虑到可用的基线结果，我们使用 Gigaword 数据集 (Rush et al., 2015) 进行抽象摘要，使用 SQuAD 1.1 数据集 (Rajpurkar et al., 2016) 进行问题生成 (Du et al., 2017)，作为在 BookCorpus 和 Wikipedia 上预训练的模型的基准。此外，我们使用 CNN/DailyMail (See et al., 2017) 和 XSum (Narayan et al., 2018) 数据集进行抽象摘要，作为在更大语料库上预训练的模型的基准。

items.en: The results for models trained on BookCorpus and Wikipedia are shown in Tables 5 and 5. We observe that GLMLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}} can achieve performance matching the other pretraining models on the two generation tasks. GLMSentSent{}_{\text{Sent}} can perform better than GLMLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}, while GLMDocDoc{}_{\text{Doc}} performs slightly worse than GLMLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}. This indicates that the document-level objective, which teaches the model to extend the given contexts, is less helpful to conditional generation, which aims to extract useful information from the context. Increasing GLMDocDoc{}_{\text{Doc}}’s parameters to 410M leads to the best performance on both tasks. The results for models trained on larger corpora are shown in Table 2. GLMRoBERTaRoBERTa{}_{\text{RoBERTa}} can achieve performance matching the seq2seq BART model, and outperform T5 and UniLMv2.
items.zh: 在BookCorpus和Wikipedia上训练的模型结果如表5和表5所示。我们观察到GLM_{Large}在两个生成任务上可以达到与其他预训练模型匹配的性能。GLM_{Sent}的表现优于GLM_{Large}，而GLM_{Doc}的表现略逊于GLM_{Large}。这表明文档级目标（教导模型扩展给定上下文）对条件生成（旨在从上下文中提取有用信息）帮助较小。将GLM_{RoBERTa}的参数增加到410M在两个任务上都取得了最佳性能。在更大语料库上训练的模型结果如表2所示。GLM_{RoBERTa}可以达到与seq2seq BART模型匹配的性能，并优于T5和UniLMv2。

items.en: Text Infilling. Text infilling is the task of predicting missing spans of text which are consistent with the surrounding context Zhu et al. (2019); Donahue et al. (2020); Shen et al. (2020). GLM is trained with an autoregressive blank infilling objective, thus can straightforwardly solve this task. We evaluate GLM on the Yahoo Answers dataset Yang et al. (2017) and compare it with Blank Language Model (BLM) Shen et al. (2020), which is a specifically designed model for text infilling. From the results in Table 5, GLM outperforms previous methods by large margins (1.3 to 3.9 BLEU) and achieves the state-of-the-art result on this dataset. We notice that GLMDocDoc{}_{\text{Doc}} slightly underperforms GLMLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}, which is consistent with our observations in the seq2seq experiments.
items.zh: 文本填充。文本填充是预测与周围上下文一致的缺失文本片段的任务（Zhu等人，2019；Donahue等人，2020；Shen等人，2020）。GLM使用自回归空白填充目标进行训练，因此可以直接解决此任务。我们在Yahoo Answers数据集（Yang等人，2017）上评估GLM，并与专门为文本填充设计的空白语言模型（BLM）（Shen等人，2020）进行比较。从表5的结果来看，GLM以较大优势（1.3至3.9 BLEU）优于先前方法，并在该数据集上取得了最先进的结果。我们注意到GLM_{Doc}的表现略逊于GLM_{Large}，这与我们在seq2seq实验中的观察一致。

items.en: Language Modeling. Most language modeling datasets such as WikiText103 are constructed from Wikipedia documents, which our pretraining dataset already contains. Therefore, we evaluate the language modeling perplexity on a held-out test set of our pretraining dataset, which contains about 20M tokens, denoted as BookWiki. We also evaluate GLM on the LAMBADA dataset Paperno et al. (2016), which tests the ability of systems to model long-range dependencies in text. The task is to predict the final word of a passage. As the baseline, we train a GPTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}} model Radford et al. (2018b); Brown et al. (2020) with the same data and tokenization as GLMLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}.
items.zh: 语言建模。大多数语言建模数据集（如WikiText103）由Wikipedia文档构成，而我们的预训练数据集已包含这些文档。因此，我们在预训练数据集的保留测试集（包含约2000万词元，记为BookWiki）上评估语言建模困惑度。我们还在LAMBADA数据集（Paperno等人，2016）上评估GLM，该数据集测试系统对文本长距离依赖的建模能力。任务是预测一段文本的最后一个词。作为基线，我们使用与GLM_{Large}相同的数据和分词方式训练了一个GPT_{Large}模型（Radford等人，2018b；Brown等人，2020）。

items.en: The results are shown in Figure 4. All the models are evaluated in the zero-shot setting. Since GLM learns the bidirectional attention, we also evaluate GLM under the setting in which the contexts are encoded with bidirectional attention. Without generative objective during pretraining, GLMLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}} cannot complete the language modeling tasks, with perplexity larger than 100. With the same amount of parameters, GLMDocDoc{}_{\text{Doc}} performs worse than GPTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}. This is expected since GLMDocDoc{}_{\text{Doc}} also optimizes the blank infilling objective. Increasing the model’s parameters to 410M (1.25×\times of GPTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}) leads to a performance close to GPTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}. GLM515M515M{}_{\text{515M}} (1.5×\times of GPTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}) can further outperform GPTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}. With the same amount of parameters, encoding the context with bidirectional attention can improve the performance of language modeling. Under this setting, GLM410M410M{}_{\text{410M}} outperforms GPTLargeLarge{}_{\text{Large}}. This is the advantage of GLM over unidirectional GPT. We also study the contribution of 2D positional encoding to long text generation. We find that removing the 2D positional encoding leads to lower accuracy and higher perplexity in language modeling.
items.zh: 结果如图4所示。所有模型均在零样本设置下评估。由于GLM学习双向注意力，我们还在上下文使用双向注意力编码的设置下评估GLM。在预训练期间没有生成目标的情况下，GLM_{Doc}无法完成语言建模任务，困惑度大于100。在相同参数量下，GLM_{Large}的表现比GPT_{Large}差。这是预期的，因为GLM_{Large}也优化了空白填充目标。将模型参数增加到410M（GPT_{Large}的1.25倍）使得性能接近GPT_{Large}。GLM_{515M}（GPT_{Large}的1.5倍）可以进一步超越GPT_{Large}。在相同参数量下，使用双向注意力编码上下文可以提高语言建模的性能。在这种设置下，GLM_{410M}优于GPT_{Large}。这是GLM相对于单向GPT的优势。我们还研究了2D位置编码对长文本生成的贡献。我们发现移除2D位置编码会导致语言建模的准确率降低和困惑度升高。

items.capZh: 图4：零样本语言建模结果。

items.en: Summary. Above all, we conclude that GLM effectively shares model parameters across natural language understanding and generation tasks, achieving better performance than a standalone BERT, encoder-decoder, or GPT model.
items.zh: 总结。综上所述，我们得出结论：GLM在自然语言理解和生成任务之间有效共享模型参数，比单独的BERT、编码器-解码器或GPT模型取得了更好的性能。

items.en: We note that T5 is pretrained with a similar blank infilling objective. GLM differs in three aspects: (1) GLM consists of a single encoder, (2) GLM shuffles the masked spans, and (3) GLM uses a single [MASK] instead of multiple sentinel tokens. While we cannot directly compare GLM with T5 due to the differences in training data and the number of parameters, the results in Tables 1 and 6 have demonstrated the advantage of GLM.
items.zh: 我们注意到T5使用类似的空白填充目标进行预训练。GLM在三个方面有所不同：（1）GLM由单个编码器组成，（2）GLM对掩码片段进行打乱，（3）GLM使用单个[MASK]而不是多个哨兵词元。虽然由于训练数据和参数数量的差异，我们无法直接比较GLM和T5，但表1和表6的结果已经证明了GLM的优势。

items.en: Pretrained Language Models. Pretraining large-scale language models significantly improves the performance of downstream tasks. There are three types of pretrained models. First, autoencoding models learn a bidirectional contextualized encoder for natural language understanding via denoising objectives Devlin et al. (2019); Joshi et al. (2020); Yang et al. (2019); Liu et al. (2019); Lan et al. (2020); Clark et al. (2020). Second, autoregressive models are trained with a left-to-right language modeling objective Radford et al. (2018a, b); Brown et al. (2020). Third, encoder-decoder models are pretrained for sequence-to-sequence tasks Song et al. (2019); Lewis et al. (2019); Bi et al. (2020); Zhang et al. (2020).
items.zh: 预训练语言模型。大规模预训练语言模型显著提高了下游任务的性能。预训练模型有三种类型。首先，自编码模型通过去噪目标学习用于自然语言理解的双向上下文编码器（Devlin等人，2019；Joshi等人，2020；Yang等人，2019；Liu等人，2019；Lan等人，2020；Clark等人，2020）。其次，自回归模型使用从左到右的语言建模目标进行训练（Radford等人，2018a, b；Brown等人，2020）。第三，编码器-解码器模型为序列到序列任务进行预训练（Song等人，2019；Lewis等人，2019；Bi等人，2020；Zhang等人，2020）。

items.en: Among encoder-decoder models, BART Lewis et al. (2019) conducts NLU tasks by feeding the same input into the encoder and decoder, and taking the final hidden states of the decoder. Instead, T5 Raffel et al. (2020) formulates most language tasks in the text-to-text framework. However, both models require more parameters to outperform autoencoding models such as RoBERTa Liu et al. (2019). UniLM Dong et al. (2019); Bao et al. (2020) unifies three pretraining models under the masked language modeling objective with different attention masks.
items.zh: 在编码器-解码器模型中，BART（Lewis等人，2019）通过将相同输入馈送到编码器和解码器，并取解码器的最终隐藏状态来执行NLU任务。而T5（Raffel等人，2020）将大多数语言任务表述为文本到文本框架。然而，这两个模型都需要更多参数才能超越自编码模型（如RoBERTa（Liu等人，2019））。UniLM（Dong等人，2019；Bao等人，2020）通过使用不同注意力掩码的掩码语言建模目标统一了三种预训练模型。

items.en: NLU as Generation. Previously, pretrained language models complete classification tasks for NLU with linear classifiers on the learned representations. GPT-2 Radford et al. (2018b) and GPT-3 Brown et al. (2020) show that generative language models can complete NLU tasks such as question answering by directly predicting the correct answers without finetuning, given task instructions or a few labeled examples. However, generative models require much more parameters to work due to the limit of unidirectional attention. Recently, PET Schick and Schütze (2020a, b) proposes to reformulate input examples as cloze questions with patterns similar to the pretraining corpus in the few-shot setting. It has been shown that combined with gradient-based finetuning, PET can achieve better performance in the few-shot setting than GPT-3 while requiring only 0.1% of its parameters. Similarly, Athiwaratkun et al. (2020) and Paolini et al. (2020) convert structured prediction tasks, such as sequence tagging and relation extraction, to sequence generation tasks.
items.zh: NLU作为生成。先前，预训练语言模型通过在学习到的表示上使用线性分类器完成NLU的分类任务。GPT-2（Radford等人，2018b）和GPT-3（Brown等人，2020）表明，生成式语言模型可以通过直接预测正确答案来完成NLU任务（如问答），而无需微调，只需给定任务指令或少量标注示例。然而，由于单向注意力的限制，生成式模型需要更多的参数才能工作。最近，PET（Schick和Schütze，2020a, b）提出在少样本设置下，将输入示例重新表述为与预训练语料库模式相似的完形填空问题。研究表明，结合基于梯度的微调，PET在少样本设置下可以取得比GPT-3更好的性能，同时仅需其0.1%的参数。类似地，Athiwaratkun等人（2020）和Paolini等人（2020）将结构化预测任务（如序列标注和关系抽取）转换为序列生成任务。

items.en: Blank Language Modeling. Donahue et al. (2020) and Shen et al. (2020) also study blanking infilling models. Different from their work, we pre-train language models with blank infilling objectives and evaluate their performance in downstream NLU and generation tasks.
items.zh: 空白语言建模。Donahue等人（2020）和Shen等人（2020）也研究了空白填充模型。与他们的工作不同，我们使用空白填充目标预训练语言模型，并在下游NLU和生成任务中评估其性能。

items.en: GLM is a general pretraining framework for natural language understanding and generation. We show that the NLU tasks can be formulated as conditional generation tasks, and therefore solvable by autoregressive models. GLM unifies the pretraining objectives for different tasks as autoregressive blank infilling, with mixed attention masks and the novel 2D position encodings. Empirically we show that GLM outperforms previous methods for NLU tasks and can effectively share parameters for different tasks.
items.zh: GLM是一个用于自然语言理解和生成的通用预训练框架。我们展示了NLU任务可以表述为条件生成任务，因此可以通过自回归模型解决。GLM将不同任务的预训练目标统一为自回归空白填充，使用混合注意力掩码和新型2D位置编码。实验表明，GLM在NLU任务上优于先前方法，并且可以有效共享不同任务的参数。

items.en: The work is supported by the NSFC for Distinguished Young Scholar(61825602), and Beijing Academy of Artificial Intelligence (BAAI).
items.zh: 本研究得到国家自然科学基金杰出青年科学基金（61825602）和北京人工智能研究院（BAAI）的支持。
